action_set_definitions.name: get_factory_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the complete current state of the factory environment, including time, machine availability, pending order details, and inventory counts.

action_set_definitions.name: get_machine_history
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the production history for a specific machine to determine the sequence of recently completed models.

machine_id.description: The ID of the machine to query.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_order_to_machine
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific order to a machine and begins processing. This operation consumes materials immediately.

order_id.description: The ID of the order to process.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation's internal clock. This updates machine statuses from 'busy' to 'idle' once their remaining time reaches zero and updates the order status to 'completed'.

ticks.description: Number of time units to advance.

until_idle.description: If true, advances time until the machines have finished their current tasks.

state_description.current_simulation_time: The current clock tick or timestamp in the factory simulation.
state_description.machines: List of production machines and their current statuses.
state_description.order_queue: Pending production orders waiting to be assigned.
state_description.inventory: Current stock of raw materials and finished products.
